title: JG Speedfit PEM0215W Equal Tee 15mm Pack of 5
features: COMPATIBILITY: Compatible with hot and cold water systems, central heating systems, plastic and copper pipes
INSTALLATION: Tool-free push-fit connection system for confined spaces
CONNECTION TYPE: Push-fit connection with Grip & Seal and Twist & Lock compression mechanism
MATERIAL PROPERTIES: Lead-free and non-toxic construction with scale and corrosion resistant design
CONTENTS: Package includes 5 white equal tees, model PEM0215W, 15 mm size
description: Product Description Why Choose JG Speedfit? JG Speedfit push-fit plumbing and heating ‚Ä¢ Install, demount and refit in seconds without tools ‚Ä¢ Safer and cleaner with no hot works, flux or glue ‚Ä¢ Less labour-intensive, especially in tight spaces ‚Ä¢ Non-toxic, resists corrosion and scale build-up ‚Ä¢ High performance leakproof connections / compatible with plastic or copper pipe How to make a connection - Standard Fittings Standard Fittings Push pipe up to Pipe Stop. If the Speedfit pipe has been cut correctly the insertion mark on the pipe will be level with the collet head Standard Fittings Pull to check connection is secure and test the system Twist & Lock Fittings Twist & Lock Fittings Twist the screwcap until it touches the body flange. This increases the O-Ring seal around the pipe and locks the pipe into position Twist & Lock Fittings If you are not using collet clips, ensure that the screwcaps are in the locked position. Pull to check it is secure An Icon of quality Premium Piece On every product John Guest Speedfit make, you‚Äôll find the JG monogram proudly stamped, as a mark of trusted authenticity and quality.
